project_type: TypeScript + React + Vite board game app
build_system: Vite with tsc for type checking
test_command: npm run build (no tests, only build verification)
verification_instructions: Run `npm run build` to verify TypeScript compiles and Vite bundles successfully
environment_constraints: None - standard npm project with network access
key_patterns: i18n system uses `useT()` hook returning `t(key)` function. TranslationKey type is derived from `keyof typeof en` in src/i18n/en.ts. All translation keys must be added to en.ts (which defines the type) and es.ts (typed as Record<TranslationKey, string>). Season cards are defined as arrays in src/types/game.ts with string `effect` fields. Components render `{card.effect}` directly. The approach should change card.effect to be a translation key (e.g., 'card.effect.sp-fukurokuju') and use t() in components.
directory_structure: src/types/game.ts (card data), src/i18n/ (translation system), src/components/ (React components rendering cards)
